nodes.name: Webhook Trigger1
nodes.notes: Receives initial HVAC text input via webhook

parameters.name: hvacAnalyzer
parameters.description: Extract I/O list from HVAC text description

nodes.name: HVAC Analyzer
nodes.notes: Extracts inputs and outputs from HVAC text

parameters.name: blockDecomposer
parameters.description: Break HVAC sequence into logical control blocks

nodes.name: Block Decomposer
nodes.notes: Decomposes HVAC text into logical control blocks

parameters.name: pseudocodeGenerator
parameters.description: Convert HVAC English description to structured pseudocode

nodes.name: Pseudocode Generator
nodes.notes: Generates structured pseudocode from blocks and I/O points

parameters.text:
You are an expert HVAC controls engineer. Your task is to analyze HVAC sequence descriptions and prepare them for BOG (Building Operation Graphics) generation.

Process the input text through these steps:
1. First, use hvacAnalyzer to extract all inputs and outputs
2. Then, use blockDecomposer to identify logical control blocks
3. Finally, use pseudocodeGenerator to create structured logic

Provide a comprehensive analysis that includes:
- All identified input/output points
- Logical control blocks found
- Structured pseudocode for each block
- Any potential issues or ambiguities in the sequence

Be thorough and ensure all HVAC components and control logic are captured.

nodes.name: HVAC Expert Agent
nodes.notes: Orchestrates HVAC analysis using tools in sequence

nodes.name: Analysis Processor
nodes.notes: Processes and validates agent analysis results

nodes.name: Preview Response
nodes.notes: Sends analysis preview to user for approval

nodes.name: Resume Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives user approval to proceed with BOG generation

nodes.name: Retrieve Analysis
nodes.notes: Retrieves stored analysis data for approved session

nodes.name: Schema Formatter
nodes.notes: Formats analysis into comprehensive PyBOG schema

nodes.name: Call PyBOG API
nodes.notes: Sends schema to PyBOG API for BOG file generation

nodes.name: Prepare Final Response
nodes.notes: Formats final API response with proper status

nodes.name: Final Webhook Response
nodes.notes: Returns final response with BOG download link

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.notes: Handles errors from any workflow step
